The '''Mikans''' were a sentient [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the asteroid [[Mika (planetoid)|Mika]], also known as Jellyfish Cove. They took the form of beautiful [[near-Human]] [[Gender/Legends|women]]; however, once they had attracted someone to them, they turned into huge [[Jellyfish/Legends|jellyfish]]-like creatures and consumed their targets. They could only come out in night or on foggy days, as when the [[Star/Legends|sun]] came out, the natural light reacted with their tissue and froze them into statue-like rocks. [[Bara (Mikan)|Bara]] was a Mikan.

Like the [[Felacatian]]s, the Mikans only had the ability to alternate between two distinct physiologies. Practiced Mikans could switch between the two forms at will.
